result.status_detail: Cycle 94 R-4 perplexity Experiment 2 (empty thread_url_slug) — MAJOR PROGRESS. Phase 1 thread-routing PROBLEM RESOLVED. Phase 2 content-render still incomplete. Detailed observations: URL CHANGED from previous '/search/blocked-{uuid}' (which 404→home) to '/search/new/2e7f6264-22b4-4fd1-815e-fbe4eb66fd13' (real thread URL, page stays). NO 'thread not found' toast. Page renders thread shell with: tab '답변', user message bubble '주민등록번호 형식이 뭐야?' visible, status '사고' (Thinking) shown for 47s+, follow-up input '후속 질문하기' available (= thread is ALIVE). BUT response/warning text body remained empty (no answer block, no warning block rendered). Empty thread_url_slug successfully unblocked routing; envelope content blocks still need design work to actually render '보안 경고' text.
result.diff_from_582_routing_progress: PASS: empty thread_url_slug → /search/new/{uuid} renders successfully (vs /search/blocked-{uuid} 404→home in 582)
result.diff_from_582_render_remaining: FAIL: response area still empty after 47s+ — only '사고' (Thinking) status persists
result.verdict: Empty thread_url_slug RESOLVED routing/redirect issue. Now the thread exists in client state, but envelope content blocks are insufficient to trigger warning render.
next_experiment_recommendations: Experiment 3: Design proper content blocks with text content for '보안 경고' — perplexity expects 'blocks' array with intended_usage values like 'pending_followups' or 'answer' (cycle 93 #551 captured 'pending_followups_block' with empty followups). Maybe need 'answer_block' with prose content or specific text_block injection.

Experiment 4: Inspect a SUCCESSFUL perplexity response (with safe prompt like 'hello') via DevTools to see what block schema the client expects to render text in answer body. Match that schema in envelope.
Experiment 5: Add final_sse_message=true with status='COMPLETE' to terminate stream cleanly — may help client transition from 'Thinking' state to render whatever blocks were sent.
Experiment 6: Set message_mode='COMPLETE' (vs 'STREAMING') to indicate response is final

notes: Cycle 94 R-4 perplexity Experiment 2 result: BREAKTHROUGH on routing (empty thread_url_slug works), incomplete on content rendering. Routing fix is the big win — moves perplexity from '/search/blocked-XXX 404' state to '/search/new/{uuid} thread alive' state. Now need content block schema design to trigger warning text render. Recommend pulling existing successful perplexity response (e.g. for safe prompt) for block schema reference.
